display_name: PSoC Edge AI Kit — ModusToolbox Template
description: ModusToolbox project template for KIT_PSE84_AI. Drop a main_example.c from TESAIoT Developer Hub into proj_cm55/app/ and build.
quick_start_steps: Download and extract the ZIP to a short path (e.g. C:\mtb\AI_Kit\)
Run `make getlibs` to fetch shared MTB libraries (one-time)
Replace proj_cm55/app/main_example.c with your example from Developer Hub
For WiFi examples: edit proj_cm55/wifi_config.h with your SSID/password
Run `make build -j` to build all 3 cores
Run `make program` to flash to board
